data.name: Hentai Bae Pinky
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Bae Pinky is a simple match-2 puzzle game where you unlock images of “happy” memories between you and your sweet lover, Pinky:

  • 10 high-quality images and animated CG

  • Simple, relaxing puzzle gameplay

  • Calming music
data.about_the_game:
Hentai Bae Pinky is a simple match-2 puzzle game where you unlock images of “happy” memories between you and your sweet lover, Pinky:

  • 10 high-quality images and animated CG

  • Simple, relaxing puzzle gameplay

  • Calming music
data.short_description: A simple match-2 puzzle game where you unlock images of “happy” memories between you and your sweet lover, Pinky

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Dual or AMD Equivalent
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Dual or AMD Equivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
